assertions.evidence: The summary states 'All infrastructure is present and working. The harness-creator bootstrap is complete.' This indicates the agent detected AGENTS.md was missing and invoked harness-creator to create it, as referenced by 'Now I need to return to the harness-executor workflow and restart from Step 1.'

The agent did not proceed to execute the user's actual task. Instead, it bootstrapped the missing infrastructure first (AGENTS.md, docs/, scripts/, harness/) and noted it needs to 'restart from Step 1' of the harness-executor workflow, indicating it correctly paused task execution until the infrastructure was in place.

The summary shows the agent directly invoked harness-creator and completed the bootstrap without mentioning that it offered the user a choice between invoking harness-creator or explaining the limitations of proceeding without it. There is no evidence of presenting options to the user.
